title: Source
text: Source This property determines whether the widget acts as a drag-and-drop source. Default is False . Source = " True | False " Value Description True The contents of this widget can be dragged to a target drag-and-drop widget. False The widget is not a drag-and-drop source Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(DDFLD) = "source=true" Copy Applies To DropTarget Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
